name: @eai/reasoning
description: Provider-agnostic reasoning interface (`decomposeGoal`, `decideNextAction`). Adapters for Gemini, Groq, Claude, OpenAI, Ollama (opt-in), Nvidia NIM. `FixtureReplayProvider` for cassettes and `ScriptedFakeProvider` for zero-network deterministic tests. Versioned prompt templates. One-shot malformed-output repair loop.
